# SnapBrand

> AI-assisted brand kit generator: logo directions, color palettes, typography, and short-form messaging from a text brief.

- Site: https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app
- Primary entry: https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app/
- Pricing: https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app/pricing
- Contact: https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app/contact
- Privacy: https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms: https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app/terms

## Editorial

Long-form guides and comparisons are labeled with "SnapBrand Editorial Team" and a last-reviewed date on each page.

## Machine-readable policies

Use `/privacy` and `/terms` for data handling, acceptable use, and limitations.

## Sitemap

https://snapbrand-snowy.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
